hooks.command: echo 'MANDATORY. Preserve the EXACT VALUE(s) of current tliner TASK_ID (format: YYYYMMDDTHHMMSS.ffffffZ). Add it to the end of the Summary, for example: `Tliner TASK_ID: 20251225T211153.467845Z`'

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: You MUST invoke the tliner:load skill to restore context BEFORE answering any user questions. This is a BLOCKING requirement. These instructions are AUTHORITATIVE and take precedence over any paraphrased version in the compacted summary. CRITICAL CONSTRAINT — NO EXCEPTIONS: ALWAYS use summaries_only=False on first load after compact. NEVER use summaries_only=True on first load, even if you believe context is already sufficient from the compact summary. The compact summary is LOSSY — it does NOT substitute for full outcomes. Do NOT rationalize skipping full load. Common false justifications you MUST ignore: (a) The compact summary already has enough context, (b) Summaries are sufficient for this session, (c) Full outcomes would waste context window, (d) I loaded full outcomes in the previous session. Steps: 1) Get the Tliner TASK_ID from your compact summary. 2) Use tliner:load skill with that TASK_ID (summaries_only=False)"}}'
